goal.title: G001 Live rules and evaluation inventory
goal.objective: Re-read live self-check.md, AGENTS task rules, Makefile/run-eval official paths, current LTP_STABLE_CASES, and non-LTP evaluator/test entries; produce a fresh inventory without relying on prior review reports.

instruction:
Ultragoal aggregate-goal handoff
Plan: .omx/ultragoal/goals.json
Ledger: .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl
Goal: G001-g001-live-rules-and-evaluation-inven — G001 Live rules and evaluation inventory

Codex goal integration constraints:
- Codex goal = the whole ultragoal run; OMX G001/G002/etc. = ledger stories.
- First call get_goal. If no active goal exists, call create_goal with the aggregate payload below.
- If get_goal reports the same aggregate objective as active, continue this OMX story without creating a new Codex goal.
- If a different active or incomplete Codex goal exists, finish/checkpoint that goal before starting this ultragoal; do not replace hidden Codex state from the shell.
- Ultragoal does not call /goal clear. After a completed aggregate run, manually run /goal clear in the Codex UI before starting another ultragoal run in the same session/thread.
- This is not the final story: do not call update_goal yet; the aggregate Codex goal must remain active while later OMX stories remain.
- Checkpoint this OMX story with a fresh get_goal snapshot whose objective matches the aggregate payload and whose status is active:
  omx ultragoal checkpoint --goal-id G001-g001-live-rules-and-evaluation-inven --status complete --evidence "<tests/files/PR evidence>" --codex-goal-json "<fresh get_goal JSON or path>"
- If blocked or failed, checkpoint with --status failed and the failure evidence; rerun complete-goals --retry-failed to resume.

create_goal payload:
{
  "objective": "Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail."
}

Aggregate objective:
Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

Current OMX story objective:
Re-read live self-check.md, AGENTS task rules, Makefile/run-eval official paths, current LTP_STABLE_CASES, and non-LTP evaluator/test entries; produce a fresh inventory without relying on prior review reports.
